title: thuja occidentalis f. hoveyi
intro: Thuja occidentalis f. hoveyi, also known as the American Arborvitae, is a fragrant, slow-growing evergreen shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for centuries due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which help to protect against infections and promote healing. The health benefits of Thuja occidentalis f. hoveyi include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever and inflammation, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Thuja occidentalis f. hoveyi include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
